de.btu.kt.syx.NotSupportedException

Beschreibung
de.btu.kt.syx

de.btu.kt.syx.devices
Device models

  • Verwendungen von NotSupportedException in de.btu.kt.syx

    Methoden in de.btu.kt.syx, die NotSupportedException zurückgeben
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static NotSupportedException
    SYX.NotSuppExc(String format, Object... args)
    Returns an InvalidMidiDataException with a formatted detail message.

  • Verwendungen von NotSupportedException in de.btu.kt.syx.devices

    Methoden in de.btu.kt.syx.devices, die NotSupportedException auslösen
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    default int
    IMulti.getPolyphony(int part)
    Returns the number of voices fixedly assigned to a multi part.
    default int
    IMulti.getReserveNotes(int part)
    Returns the number of voices reserved for a multi part.
    default void
    IMulti.setMidiChannel(int part, int channel)
    Sets the MIDI channel assigned to a multi part.
    default void
    IMulti.setPan(int part, float pan)
    Gets the panning of a part
    default void
    IMulti.setPartActive(int part, boolean active)
    Switches a multi part on or off.
    default void
    IMulti.setPolyphony(int part, int polyphony)
    Sets the the number of voices fixedly assigned to a multi part.
    default void
    IMulti.setReserveNotes(int part, int reserveNotes)
    Sets the number of voices reserved for a multi part.
